name: build
description: Spec-Driven Development for non-devs. A re-entrant, state-file-driven build pipeline that turns an idea into a shipped, dogfooded product one vertical slice at a time: a shaping gate and constitution up front, then per-phase spec → design → backend → review with outcome-only user gates, closing with a deploy milestone. Resumes mid-phase after context loss. Trigger with /build.
